description: Sovereign-risk credit-spread contribution as a trapezoidal stress curve. Anchored on the exporter (or counterparty) country's sovereign rating-implied spread. Returned in decimal annualised units (e.g. 0.0050 = 50bps).
formula_pseudocode: sov(t) = trapezoid(initial, peak, stress_timing); out_decimal = sov(t);

peak.description: Peak sovereign spread at months_to_peak (decimal). Equal to initial means flat.

source_citations: S&P / Moody's / Fitch sovereign credit ratings and rating-action releases.
V1 inline CORRIDOR_PARAMETERS (India-US base 50bps, peak 70bps) in SWAPS-1LOAN-WHAT-IF-3-INP-FINAL.json (preserved verbatim by india-us-textiles.json for Iteration 1).
Sovereign rating -> spread basis tables to be externalised into corridor-references/sovereign-ratings.json in Iteration 2+.
